sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 40 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 21. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Per Learned counsel the questions proposed for determination have already been decided against the applicant / department by virtue of judgment reported as 2002 PTD 570. He states that in view thereof, this reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
